title: Item Enchantment Editor
description: This datapack adds a menu to change the enchantments, glint and enchantment tooltip visibility. (8 Languages and user-friendly)
body:
## Features ✨

- 8 Languages 🚩
- Tutorial 📺
- User-friendly 😊
- Good compatibility ✅
- Data Pack and Mod ⚙️

## Description 📜

This datapack adds a menu to change the enchantments, glint and enchantment tooltip visibility of the item of any player's mainhand. The menu is reachable trough _/function item_ench_editor:opengui_ command.
## Some Info ℹ️

- You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M) or [creating an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/AlzAlz123/itemencheditor/issues).
- If you for example installed 1.21.7 version of the pack to Minecraft 1.21.7 and it says it is not compatible, don't trust that message. You installed the right one. _There was a bit of problems with the version :)_
- Better use the datapack because the mod can have problems.

## Tutorial Video 📺

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CrTLkqWnWdo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>








Video Chapters:

**0:00** Opening the menu

**0:13** Adding enchantments

**1:09** Removing enchantments

**1:30** Removing all enchantments

**1:41** Enabling/Disabling glint

**3:28** Enabling/Disabling Enchantment tooltips

## Language Support (v1.2+) 🚩

English: use /function item_ench_editor:opengui

German: use /function item_ench_editor:lang/opengui_de

French: use /function item_ench_editor:lang/opengui_fr

Russian: use /function item_ench_editor:lang/opengui_ru

Turkish: use /function item_ench_editor:lang/opengui_tr

Chinese: use /function item_ench_editor:lang/opengui_ch

Japanese: use /function item_ench_editor:lang/opengui_ja

Spanish: use /function item_ench_editor:lang/opengui_sp
